Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 243 

SRC_LCTN_CD 

LABEL: Denotes the Claims Payment System from which the Claim was Extracted 

DESCRIPTION: Denotes the claims payment system from which the claim was extracted. 

SHORT NAME: SRC_LCTN_CD 

LONG NAME: SRC_LCTN_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 2 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 

FILE(S): IP header 
LT header 
OT header 
RX header 

VALUES: 01 = MMIS 
02 = Non-MMIS
